user_intent: Hero image for Run It UP Dallas run club app. A group of Black runners mid-stride through a gritty urban downtown street at night. Hard athletic campaign lighting like Oakley and Nike. Neon lime green and orange light accents from the environment. Sweat visible. Ad campaign energy.

subject.description: Black man, early 30s, athletic build, dark brown skin glistening with sweat, intense focused expression, mid-stride with powerful form, visible quad definition, sweat droplets catching light on his forehead and arms
clothing: black compression tee with small neon lime green logo on chest
neon lime green Nike Vaporfly running shoes

subject.description: Black woman, late 20s, athletic build, rich dark skin with visible sweat sheen, determined expression, mid-stride slightly behind runner_1, natural hair pulled back in a high puff
clothing: black high-waisted running leggings with reflective strip down the side
black running shoes with orange accents

subject.description: Black man, mid 20s, lean runner build, light brown skin, wide energetic smile showing he is loving this, slightly behind the lead two runners, arms pumping
clothing: sleeveless black tank with neon lime green trim

scene.location: Deep Ellum district in Dallas Texas at night, gritty urban street with brick warehouse buildings, neon signs casting lime green and orange light pools on wet asphalt, graffiti murals on walls, string lights overhead between buildings, the street stretching behind them into bokeh city lights
scene.weather: warm humid summer night, slight haze in the air catching the neon light, wet pavement from earlier rain reflecting all the neon

lighting.direction: hard backlit rim light from behind with neon lime green and orange fill from street-level neon signs on both sides

materials.texture: gritty urban texture, rough surfaces contrasting with smooth athletic skin

composition.framing: leading lines from the street converging behind runners, runners filling bottom two-thirds of frame
composition.angle: low-angle shooting upward at runners making them look powerful and heroic
composition.focus_subject: lead runner's face and upper body tack sharp, background neon signs and trailing runners with slight motion blur

quality.sharpness: razor-sharp on lead subjects with controlled motion blur on extremities
quality.post_processing: cinematic color grading with crushed blacks, neon lime green and orange color cast from environment, slight film grain, high contrast, Nike Running campaign grade

negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, watermark, text overlay, distorted hands, extra fingers, cartoon, illustration, anime, soft lighting, flat lighting, overexposed, washed out, stock photo look, smiling too much, posed, stiff, corporate, generic gym
